logic: Project land must meet forest definition threshold for 10+ years. Mangroves exempt from height.
notes: Document host-country forest definition and 10-year evidence.
source_excerpt: Land in the project area has qualified as forest (following the definition used by the VCS; in addition, see Section 5.1.2) for at least the 10 years prior to the project start date.
pass_condition: Project area documented as meeting host-country forest definition for 10+ years prior to project start
fail_condition: Cannot demonstrate 10-year forest qualification or forest definition not met

logic: Binary classification: unplanned (no legal right) vs planned (legally permitted conversion). Determines which BL module applies.
notes: Provide evidence of legal status of deforestation agents.
source_excerpt: Baseline deforestation in the project area falls within either of the following categories: (a) Unplanned deforestation (VCS category AUDef) (b) Planned deforestation (VCS category APDef)
pass_condition: Baseline deforestation categorized as AUDef or APDef with supporting evidence
fail_condition: Cannot determine deforestation category or deforestation does not fall into AUDef/APDef

logic: Three criteria must ALL be met. Excludes large-scale industrial agriculture/aquaculture.
notes: Document agent profiles and historical deforestation evidence.
source_excerpt: Baseline agents of deforestation meet all of the following criteria: a) Clear the land for tree harvesting, settlements, crop production, ranching or aquaculture; b) Have no documented and uncontested legal right to deforest; c) Have caused deforestation in the historical reference period.
pass_condition: All three agent criteria demonstrated with verifiable evidence
fail_condition: Any of the three criteria not met or insufficient evidence

logic: Must have legal documentation authorizing conversion.
notes: Provide legal permits and documentation.
source_excerpt: Where conversion of forest lands to a deforested condition is legally authorized and documented.
pass_condition: Legal authorization for forest conversion documented and verified
fail_condition: No legal authorization exists or authorization is contested

logic: Water table lowering is prohibited except for two specific exceptions.
notes: Monitor water table levels throughout crediting period.
source_excerpt: Project activities lower the water table, unless the project converts open water to tidal wetlands, or improves the hydrological connection to impounded waters.
pass_condition: Water table not lowered, or documented exception (open water conversion/hydrological improvement)
fail_condition: Water table lowered without qualifying exception

logic: Absolute prohibition on organic soil burning as a project activity.
source_excerpt: Project activities include the burning of organic soil.
pass_condition: No organic soil burning documented in project area
fail_condition: Organic soil burning occurs as project activity

logic: No nitrogen fertilizer application allowed during entire crediting period.
notes: Document land management practices to confirm compliance.
source_excerpt: Nitrogen fertilizer(s), such as chemical fertilizer or manure, are applied in the project area during the project crediting period.
pass_condition: No nitrogen fertilizer application during crediting period
fail_condition: Nitrogen fertilizers applied in project area

logic: Spillover emissions from hydrological changes must be assessed and not be significant.
notes: Use T-SIG to assess significance.
source_excerpt: Hydrological connectivity of the project area with adjacent areas leads to a significant increase in GHG emissions outside the project area.
pass_condition: Hydrological connectivity assessed; no significant off-site GHG increase
fail_condition: Significant GHG emissions increase outside project area due to hydrological changes

logic: Three alternative conditions. Must demonstrate one with verifiable evidence.
notes: Provide laws, management plans, annual reports, or market studies.
source_excerpt: Prior to the project start date, the project area meets one of: (a) free of any land use that may be displaced; (b) under land use where displacement is prohibited by enforced law; (c) under land use that continues at similar or greater level.
pass_condition: One of three conditions (a, b, or c) demonstrated with verifiable evidence
fail_condition: Cannot demonstrate any of the three conditions

logic: Must meet VCS peatland definition based on IPCC organic soil thresholds.
notes: Soil sampling required to confirm organic soil classification.
source_excerpt: Rewetting drained peatland (RDP) activities occur on project areas that meet the VCS definition for peatland.
pass_condition: Soil sampling confirms organic soil meets IPCC Wetlands supplement thresholds
fail_condition: Soil does not meet organic soil thresholds

logic: Must include at least one defined restoration activity type.
notes: Describe specific restoration actions in PD.
source_excerpt: Project activities restoring tidal wetlands include any of: creating/restoring hydrology, altering sediment supply, changing salinity, managing vegetation, prescribed burning.
pass_condition: At least one defined restoration activity type documented and implemented
fail_condition: No qualifying restoration activity documented

logic: Must include at least one defined conservation activity type.
source_excerpt: Project activities conserving tidal wetlands include: protecting at-risk wetlands, improving water management, maintaining water quality, recharging sediment, creating accommodation space.
pass_condition: At least one defined conservation activity documented
fail_condition: No qualifying conservation activity documented

logic: Parallel to AUDef criteria but for wetland degradation.
source_excerpt: Baseline agents of wetland degradation meet all of: (a) cause alteration in hydrology or loss of SOC; (b) have no documented legal right; (c) have degraded wetlands in historical reference period.
pass_condition: All three agent criteria demonstrated
fail_condition: Any criteria not met or insufficient evidence

logic: IFM and ARR explicitly excluded. ARR in wetlands requires VM0047 + WRC modules.
notes: ARR in peatlands must include rewetting.
source_excerpt: This methodology does not apply to ARR project activities. Where WRC projects using this methodology also implement ARR activities, projects must use an appropriate ARR methodology (e.g., VM0047).
pass_condition: IFM/ARR activities not claimed under this methodology; separate methodology used if applicable
fail_condition: IFM or ARR activities claimed under VM0007

logic: Two specific leakage prevention activities are explicitly prohibited.
source_excerpt: Leakage prevention activities include: (a) Flooding agricultural lands to increase production; and/or (b) Intensifying livestock production through use of feed-lots and/or manure lagoons.
pass_condition: Leakage prevention does not include prohibited activities
fail_condition: Prohibited leakage prevention activities identified

logic: Six required data elements for each discrete land parcel.
notes: Boundaries are fixed ex-ante and cannot change.
source_excerpt: Six required data elements for each discrete land parcel.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Geographic boundary definition
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Geographic boundary definition

logic: Strict no-overlap rule. REDD+WRC combination is the sole exception.
source_excerpt: Strict no-overlap rule. REDD+WRC combination is the sole exception.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: No spatial overlap between baselines
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: No spatial overlap between baselines

summary: Exclusion of land in other GHG programs
logic: Double-counting prevention. Must track and report exclusions.
notes: Cross-reference with other registry records.
source_excerpt: Double-counting prevention. Must track and report exclusions.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Exclusion of land in other GHG programs
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Exclusion of land in other GHG programs

logic: RRD required for baseline modeling. Must be in same jurisdiction with similar characteristics.
source_excerpt: RRD required for baseline modeling. Must be in same jurisdiction with similar characteristics.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: REDD reference region definition
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: REDD reference region definition

logic: Proxy areas required for planned deforestation baseline.
source_excerpt: Proxy areas required for planned deforestation baseline.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: REDD proxy area definition
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: REDD proxy area definition

logic: Stratification mandatory. Different activity types must be in separate strata.
source_excerpt: Stratification mandatory. Different activity types must be in separate strata.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Stratification requirement
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Stratification requirement

summary: Carbon pool selection per activity type
logic: Pool inclusion/exclusion must be justified. If included in baseline, must also be in project and leakage.
notes: Selection documented in PD and monitoring report.
source_excerpt: Pool inclusion/exclusion must be justified. If included in baseline, must also be in project and leakage.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Carbon pool selection per activity type
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Carbon pool selection per activity type

logic: AGB always mandatory. HWP and dead wood conditionally mandatory based on baseline/project comparison.
source_excerpt: AGB always mandatory. HWP and dead wood conditionally mandatory based on baseline/project comparison.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: REDD mandatory carbon pools
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: REDD mandatory carbon pools

logic: WRC focuses on SOC pool. Biomass pools excluded unless ARR applies.
source_excerpt: WRC focuses on SOC pool. Biomass pools excluded unless ARR applies.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: WRC carbon pools
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: WRC carbon pools

logic: GHG sources must be identified per Table 7 with inclusion/exclusion justification.
notes: Use T-SIG to test significance of excluded sources.
source_excerpt: GHG sources must be identified per Table 7 with inclusion/exclusion justification.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: REDD GHG source identification
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: REDD GHG source identification

logic: GHG sources per Tables 8-9. Mandatory for CO2 from SOC, CH4 from SOC, combustion gases.
source_excerpt: GHG sources per Tables 8-9. Mandatory for CO2 from SOC, CH4 from SOC, combustion gases.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: WRC GHG source identification
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: WRC GHG source identification

logic: Symmetric accounting: baseline inclusion implies project inclusion.
source_excerpt: Symmetric accounting: baseline inclusion implies project inclusion.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Consistency rule: baseline-project source matching
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Consistency rule: baseline-project source matching

logic: Fixed period for baseline modeling. Duration per VCS Standard.
source_excerpt: Fixed period for baseline modeling. Duration per VCS Standard.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Historical reference period
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Historical reference period

logic: 20-100 year range. Must be specified in PD.
source_excerpt: 20-100 year range. Must be specified in PD.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Crediting period duration
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Crediting period duration

logic: 100-year SOC horizon test. Must show significant difference. Assessed ex-ante conservatively.
notes: Procedures in Module X-STR.
source_excerpt: 100-year SOC horizon test. Must show significant difference. Assessed ex-ante conservatively.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: WRC 100-year SOC difference requirement
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: WRC 100-year SOC difference requirement

logic: Sea-level rise must be factored into boundary delineation for tidal projects.
source_excerpt: Sea-level rise must be factored into boundary delineation for tidal projects.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Tidal wetland sea-level rise boundary
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Tidal wetland sea-level rise boundary

logic: VT0001 mandatory. Stepwise approach: list alternatives, barrier/investment analysis, select most plausible.
source_excerpt: VT0001 mandatory. Stepwise approach: list alternatives, barrier/investment analysis, select most plausible.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Baseline scenario determination via VT0001
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Baseline scenario determination via VT0001

logic: Three mandatory alternatives unless demonstrated not credible or non-compliant.
source_excerpt: Three mandatory alternatives unless demonstrated not credible or non-compliant.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Minimum alternative scenario list
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Minimum alternative scenario list

logic: Two-step: barrier analysis first, then investment analysis or qualitative GHG estimation as fallback.
source_excerpt: Two-step: barrier analysis first, then investment analysis or qualitative GHG estimation as fallback.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Barrier analysis baseline selection
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Barrier analysis baseline selection

logic: Three options with different selection criteria. Option I is cost-only, Option II is IRR/NPV, Option III is benchmark-based.
source_excerpt: Three options with different selection criteria. Option I is cost-only, Option II is IRR/NPV, Option III is benchmark-based.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Investment analysis baseline selection
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Investment analysis baseline selection

logic: Module selection based on deforestation category.
source_excerpt: Module selection based on deforestation category.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: REDD baseline modules
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: REDD baseline modules

logic: Module selection depends on substrate (peat vs tidal) and activity type (CIW vs RWE vs combined).
source_excerpt: Module selection depends on substrate (peat vs tidal) and activity type (CIW vs RWE vs combined).
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: WRC baseline modules
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: WRC baseline modules

logic: Periodic reassessment per VCS Standard. Must capture changes in deforestation drivers/behavior.
notes: Reassessments must capture changes in drivers and behavior.
source_excerpt: Periodic reassessment per VCS Standard. Must capture changes in deforestation drivers/behavior.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Baseline reassessment frequency
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Baseline reassessment frequency

logic: JNR data is acceptable as a conservative source even if less accurate.
notes: Must demonstrate JNR compliance.
source_excerpt: JNR data is acceptable as a conservative source even if less accurate.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: JNR data use
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: JNR data use

logic: VT0001 mandatory for all non-tidal-wetland activities.
source_excerpt: VT0001 mandatory for all non-tidal-wetland activities.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: VT0001 additionality requirement
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: VT0001 additionality requirement

logic: Activity method (ADD-AM) replaces project method (VT0001) for tidal wetlands only.
source_excerpt: Activity method (ADD-AM) replaces project method (VT0001) for tidal wetlands only.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Tidal wetland additionality method
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Tidal wetland additionality method

logic: Standard REDD equation. Three components summed over monitoring period.
notes: Use Equations 2, 3, 4 for component breakdown.
source_excerpt: Standard REDD equation. Three components summed over monitoring period.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: REDD net emission reduction equation
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: REDD net emission reduction equation

logic: Parallel to REDD equation. Components use peat/tidal wetland modules.
source_excerpt: Parallel to REDD equation. Components use peat/tidal wetland modules.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: WRC net emission reduction equation
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: WRC net emission reduction equation

logic: Three leakage components. Activity shifting via LK-ASP and LK-ASU modules. Market effects via LK-ME.
source_excerpt: Three leakage components. Activity shifting via LK-ASP and LK-ASU modules. Market effects via LK-ME.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: REDD leakage components
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: REDD leakage components

logic: Three components including ecological leakage specific to wetlands.
source_excerpt: Three components including ecological leakage specific to wetlands.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: WRC leakage components
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: WRC leakage components

logic: Three buffer components. Each = (baseline - project) × Buffer%. Buffer% from T-BAR.
notes: Buffer% varies by risk classification.
source_excerpt: Three buffer components. Each = (baseline - project) × Buffer%. Buffer% from T-BAR.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Buffer pool contribution calculation
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Buffer pool contribution calculation

logic: 15% threshold at 90% CI. Excess deducted proportionally. Below threshold, no deduction.
source_excerpt: 15% threshold at 90% CI. Excess deducted proportionally. Below threshold, no deduction.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Uncertainty adjustment
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Uncertainty adjustment

uncertainty.treatment: 15% threshold at 90% CI. Excess deducted proportionally. Below threshold, no deduction.

logic: Period credits = incremental adjusted NER minus buffer withholding.
source_excerpt: Period credits = incremental adjusted NER minus buffer withholding.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: VCU calculation
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: VCU calculation

logic: Five carbon pool modules. Each optional except AG biomass per R-2-0008.
source_excerpt: Five carbon pool modules. Each optional except AG biomass per R-2-0008.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Carbon pool modules for REDD
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Carbon pool modules for REDD

logic: Module selection by activity type and emission source.
source_excerpt: Module selection by activity type and emission source.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Project emissions modules
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Project emissions modules

logic: Four mandatory monitoring tasks. Each requires technical description, data list, procedures, QA/QC, archiving, responsibilities.
source_excerpt: Four mandatory monitoring tasks. Each requires technical description, data list, procedures, QA/QC, archiving, responsibilities.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Monitoring plan four tasks
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Monitoring plan four tasks

logic: Six required content elements per task.
source_excerpt: Six required content elements per task.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Monitoring plan content requirements
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Monitoring plan content requirements

logic: GPS or georeferenced data mandatory. Strata included.
source_excerpt: GPS or georeferenced data mandatory. Strata included.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Geographic position recording
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Geographic position recording

logic: Six minimum SOP/QA/QC elements.
notes: Adapt from national land use monitoring SOPs where available.
source_excerpt: Six minimum SOP/QA/QC elements.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: SOP and QA/QC requirements
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: SOP and QA/QC requirements

logic: 10-year minimum frequency. Spatial variables must be refreshed.
source_excerpt: 10-year minimum frequency. Spatial variables must be refreshed.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: REDD forest cover monitoring
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: REDD forest cover monitoring

logic: Three ongoing compliance checks. Fire triggers premium cancellation.
notes: Water depth measured before each verification per M-PEAT or M-TW.
source_excerpt: Three ongoing compliance checks. Fire triggers premium cancellation.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: WRC compliance monitoring
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: WRC compliance monitoring

logic: IPCC 2006 expert judgment protocol mandatory. Rationale must be documented.
source_excerpt: IPCC 2006 expert judgment protocol mandatory. Rationale must be documented.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Expert judgment documentation
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Expert judgment documentation

logic: Three data source tiers: literature > IPCC defaults > expert opinion.
notes: If uncertainty is significant, choose data that underestimates benefits.
source_excerpt: Three data source tiers: literature > IPCC defaults > expert opinion.
pass_condition: Requirement satisfied: Uncertainty reduction requirements
fail_condition: Requirement not satisfied: Uncertainty reduction requirements

uncertainty.treatment: Three data source tiers: literature > IPCC defaults > expert opinion.
